title: Apple’s AirPods Max 2 Blurs the Lines Between Marketing and Innovation - Bloomberg.com
content:
The new AirPods Max headphones show that the line between marketing and genuine innovation is blurring. Also: Apple retail stores have hiked the price of external storage; inventory of HomePods and Apple TVs is dwindling again; and the company’s home hardware chief has bolted for Oura.

Last week in Power On: Apple’s Liquid Glass interface isn’t going anywhere anytime soon.

### The Starters

This past week, shortly after refreshing several Macs, the iPhone 17e and the iPad Air, Apple Inc. announced the AirPods Max 2. [...] Apple has had fresh versions of at least the Apple TV and HomePod mini ready since last year, but it’s held off on releasing them because the company is waiting for the new Siri and other artificial intelligence upgrades. Those features are still nowhere near ready, so if the new hardware is indeed coming soon, it probably means Apple just got tired of waiting. (Though the AI features are essential to a separate long-awaited home hub, they’re just a nice add-on for the HomePods and Apple TV.) [...] Q: Where’s the entry-level iPad update?

Resize the Clock Display on Your iPhone Lock Screen

21 hours ago by Tim Hardwick [...] The latest information aligns with a growing body of mixed reports surrounding the iPhone 18 Pro models. Earlier claims from multiple sources, including Bloomberg's Mark Gurman and display industry analyst Ross Young, indicated that Apple would reduce the size of the ‌Dynamic Island‌, likely by relocating some ‌Face ID‌ components beneath the display.

Other sources have cast doubt on the extent of these changes. Weibo leaker "Digital Chat Station" recently claimed that the ‌iPhone 18 Pro‌ models may reuse much of their existing front-facing design, with ‌Face ID‌ and the ‌Dynamic Island‌ remaining "largely unchanged" and more ambitious under-display implementations pushed to a later generation. [...] [72 comments ]

其他消息來源則對這些變化的程度表示懷疑。微博爆料者「數碼閒聊站」最近聲稱，‌iPhone 18 Pro‌ 機型可能大部分會重複使用其現有的正面設計，‌Face ID‌ 和 ‌動態島‌ 將「大致保持不變」，而更具野心的螢幕下實施方案則會推遲到下一代。 [...] [72 條評論]

title: Apple releases new updates for old versions of iOS, macOS, watchOS, more - 9to5Mac
content:
Go to the 9to5Mac home page

 iOS 18

# Apple releases new updates for old versions of iOS, macOS, watchOS, more

Ryan Christoffel | Mar 24 2026 - 10:40 am PT

4 Comments

Apple just shipped iOS 26.4 and its companion updates for users running the latest OS. The company also debuted new software updates today for old iOS, macOS, iPadOS, and watchOS versions, including iOS 18.7.7 and more.

## iOS 18.7.7 and more OS updates focus on security fixes

If you use any Apple devices, there’s a very good chance you have new software updates available to install today.

Apple’s flagship releases today include iOS 26.4, iPadOS 26.4, macOS 26.4, and more.

But in many cases, even devices running older OS versions have received new software releases. [...] Per Aaron Perris on X, Apple has also released the following pre-OS 26 updates:

 iOS 18.7.7
 iPadOS 18.7.7
 macOS 15.7.5
 macOS 14.8.5
 watchOS 8.8.2
 watchOS 5.3.10

So if you’re running iOS or iPadOS 18, macOS Sonoma or Sequoia, or watchOS 8 or 5, these updates will offer the latest enhancements on your devices.

Apple’s release notes say these new updates focus on security updates. So to ensure your device is protected against the most recently discovered vulnerabilities, be sure to install the latest software.

Are you still running any of these older software versions? When do you plan to update to OS 26? Let us know in the comments.

### Best iPhone accessories [...] ### Best iPhone accessories

 AirPods Pro 3 (limited-time $199 price)
 10-year AirTag battery case 2-pack
 MagSafe Car Mount for iPhone
 Apple’s new AirTag 2 (1-pack / 4-pack)
 100W USB-C fast charging power adapter

FTC: We use income earning auto affiliate links. More.

You’re reading 9to5Mac — experts who break news about Apple and its surrounding ecosystem, day after day. Be sure to check out our homepage for all the latest news, and follow 9to5Mac on Twitter, Facebook, and LinkedIn to stay in the loop. Don’t know where to start? Check out our exclusive stories, reviews, how-tos, and subscribe to our YouTube channel

content_zh:
前往 9to5Mac 首頁

iOS 18

# Apple 為舊版 iOS、macOS、watchOS 等發布新更新

Ryan Christoffel | 2026 年 3 月 24 日 - 上午 10:40 PT

4 則留言

Apple 剛剛為運行最新作業系統的用戶發布了 iOS 26.4 及其配套更新。該公司今天也為舊版 iOS、macOS、iPadOS 和 watchOS 發布了新的軟體更新，包括 iOS 18.7.7 等。

## iOS 18.7.7 及更多作業系統更新專注於安全修復

如果您使用任何 Apple 裝置，今天很有可能會有新的軟體更新可供安裝。

Apple 今天發布的旗艦版本包括 iOS 26.4、iPadOS 26.4、macOS 26.4 等。

但在許多情況下，即使是運行舊版作業系統的裝置也收到了新的軟體發布。 [...] 根據 Aaron Perris 在 X 上的消息，Apple 也發布了以下 OS 26 之前的更新：

 iOS 18.7.7
 iPadOS 18.7.7
 macOS 15.7.5
 macOS 14.8.5
 watchOS 8.8.2
 watchOS 5.3.10

因此，如果您正在運行 iOS 或 iPadOS 18、macOS Sonoma 或 Sequoia，或 watchOS 8 或 5，這些更新將為您的裝置提供最新的增強功能。

Apple 的發布說明指出，這些新更新專注於安全更新。因此，為確保您的裝置免受最新發現的漏洞侵害，請務必安裝最新的軟體。

您是否仍在運行這些舊版軟體？您打算何時更新到 OS 26？請在評論中告訴我們。

### 最佳 iPhone 配件 [...] ### 最佳 iPhone 配件

 AirPods Pro 3（限時 $199 價格）
 10 年 AirTag 電池保護殼 2 件裝
 適用於 iPhone 的 MagSafe 車載支架
 Apple 新 AirTag 2（1 件裝 / 4 件裝）
 100W USB-C 快速充電電源轉接器

FTC：我們使用賺取收入的自動聯盟連結。更多資訊。

您正在閱讀 9to5Mac — 每天報導 Apple 及其周邊生態系統新聞的專家。請務必查看我們的主頁以獲取所有最新消息，並在 Twitter、Facebook 和 LinkedIn 上關注 9to5Mac 以掌握最新資訊。不知道從何開始？查看我們的獨家報導、評論、操作指南，並訂閱我們的 YouTube 頻道。
